name: glean
description: Glean MCP — unified search and read access across Slack, Google Drive, Confluence, GitHub, and all indexed company resources.

tools.search: Find documents, threads, and people by keyword + filters. Use owner:, from:, updated:, after:, before: filters.
tools.read_document: Fetch full content of a document by URL. Use after search to get complete text.
tools.chat: Ask complex questions requiring synthesis across multiple sources.

steps: The Glean MCP is already available as 'glean_default' in Claude Code if your organization has it configured.
No additional setup is required — authentication is handled via your Glean workspace SSO.
If not yet configured, contact your workspace admin or follow the Glean MCP setup docs at https://developers.glean.com/docs/mcp.

usage_notes: Prefer search + read_document over chat for growth capture — you want specific artifacts, not synthesis.
Use chat when writing reflections that need to reason across multiple sources.
Search results are permission-filtered — you will only see content you have access to.
